case_title: JOHN HADEED VS. JOSEPH VAN D'AMATO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY HADEED, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT VAN D'AMATO, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HADEED, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT VAN D'AMATO, JOSEPH
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-18-2007, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VAN D'AMATO, JOSEPH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HADEED, JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VAN D'AMATO, JOSEPH BASED ON THE AVAILABLE TESTIMONY AND EVIDENCE, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE NEGLIGENCE OF THE THIRD PARTY DRIVER DOMINGUEZ WAS THE SUPERCEDING CAUSE OF THE SUBJECT COLLISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2008 - JUDGMENT.
